75200.subject: Everything You Need to Know About ACP-285
75200.body:
View this post on the web at https://www.team1.blog/p/everything-you-need-to-know-about

Avalanche is preparing another protocol upgrade, but this time the focus isn’t on faster transactions or new features. Instead, it’s about the network’s economic model.
ACP-285 (Reduce Minimum Consumption Rate) [ https://substack.com/redirect/6df3a3a4-e93e-4b5e-91cc-371d716d6a9d?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] proposes a change to how staking rewards are calculated. While the adjustment may seem small, it is designed to encourage longer staking commitments, reduce the rate at which new AVAX is issued, and improve the long-term sustainability of Avalanche’s staking system.
If approved, ACP-285 will become part of the upcoming Helicon upgrade alongside ACP-236 (Continuous Staking) [ https://substack.com/redirect/7863849e-ac29-4fbf-88b1-243bb749a9a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] and ACP-273 (Reduced Minimum Staking Duration) [ https://substack.com/redirect/bd6a2e38-dfa9-4e23-92f1-19f4fac2971e?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ].
Want to keep up with the latest in the Avalanche ecosystem? Subscribe to the Team1 blog and get our updates in your inbox weekly.
What Is an Avalanche Community Proposal?
Avalanche Community Proposals (ACPs) [ https://substack.com/redirect/d0be4120-2ff7-4de2-9750-e4de0d2d5197?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] are how protocol upgrades are introduced and discussed within the ecosystem. Rather than implementing changes immediately, proposals are published publicly so validators, developers, researchers, and community members can review them, ask questions, and provide feedback before they are adopted.
ACP-285 is currently in this discussion phase, meaning there is still an opportunity for the community to help shape the proposal before it becomes part of a future network upgrade.
How Avalanche Staking Rewards Work
When you stake AVAX on the Primary Network, your rewards depend partly on how long you commit your stake.
Avalanche calculates staking rewards using two key parameters:
Minimum Consumption Rate: the reward floor for shorter staking periods.
Maximum Consumption Rate: the highest reward available for staking the full 365-day period.
Today, these values are 10% and 12%, meaning the difference in rewards between shorter and longer staking commitments is relatively small.
What Does ACP-285 Change?
ACP-285 proposes lowering the Minimum Consumption Rate from 10% to 7.5%, while leaving the Maximum Consumption Rate unchanged at 12%.
The proposal only affects new staking periods that begin after it takes effect. Existing staking positions would continue under the reward parameters that were in place when they started.
By lowering the reward floor while keeping the maximum reward the same, Avalanche aims to create a stronger incentive for validators to commit to longer staking periods.

75191.subject: Cenová po(sh)nuka
75191.body:
Zdravím Ruslana a Oleh ! 💍🤍

Podarilo sa nám sfinalizovať cenovú ponuku na výzdobu.

Cenová ponuka je samozrejme kostra - ak budete chcieť niečo ubrať alebo
pridať, samozrejme zmeny doladíme, pretože ste neposlali žiadne obrázky k
výzdobe, tak sme išli len podľa toho čo sme sa rozprávali..
Radi si prejdeme všetko. Sme otvorení konštruktívnej kritike aj úprimnému
názoru, takže sa nebojíme slov "toto nechcem" alebo "toto sa nám nepáči",
pretože dizajn je veľmi subjektívny pocit. 😊🙏 Nenaceňovali sme obrad,
pretože nevieme ešte čo budeme a kde robiť. :)

Podávam kontakt aj na grafičku.
V prípade záujmu o svadobné oznámania či pozvánky a iné tlačoviny ako
etikety, nálepky a podobne, naša grafička z Dekami.creativ Vám je k
dispozícií, stačí ju kontaktovať, ona už o Vás bude vedieť. Ona bude
samostatne naceňovať tlačoviny (menu, zasadací poriadok...). 😊 Katarína
Nagyová -nagyovakatarina11@gmail.com
www.dekami.sk

Budeme sa tešiť na Vašu spätnú väzbu! 🩷

S pozdravom

Lenka

-- 
S pozdravom

Ing. Lenka Gattiker, MBA
Vaša osobná posh asistentka

Svadobná Agentúra PoshPosh

www.poshposh.sk

75190.subject: Európe hrozí nová vlna likvidácie priemyslu
75190.body:
VÝBER TRENDU

Автор: TREND.sk


Автор: TREND.sk

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/eur%C3%B3pe-hroz%C3%AD-nov%C3%A1-vlna-likvid%C3%A1cie-priemyslu-trend-holding-5ekle?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3Bw71vrw2%2BSEqRCskQqy7H7w%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2G2c5zeld7nIk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqyveoac~3d-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqyveoac-3d
  
Minulý týždeň dostal európsky automotive tri rany naraz. BMW oznámilo, že jeho marža môže tento rok klesnúť až na jedno percento oproti pôvodnému výhľadu šesť percent. Mercedes-Benz otvára rokovania s odbormi o ďalších úsporách, hoci má s pracovníkmi dohody platné do roku 2034, vylučujúce prepúšťanie. A Stellantis potvrdil, že jeho závod v bretónskom Rennes – fabrika, ktorá od 60. rokov vyrábala Citroëny – začne od roku 2028 vyrábať autá pre čínsku značku Voyah, dcéru Dongfeng Motor...pokračovanie Slovákov snívajúcich o byte pri Jadrane prebúdza chladná realita Sen o pasívnom príjme pri Jadrane naráža na čísla, ktoré väčšina investorov pred kúpou nevidela. Kde na chorvátskom pobreží investícia ešte dáva zmysel a kde už ceny predbehli výnosy? Čínske autá doma nechcú, do Európy sa valí ďalšia vlna exportu Domáci trh je slabý, nadprodukcia vyráža do sveta Volvo opäť prekvapilo Slovensko. Košice môžu vyrábať aj iné čínske autá Nenápadné priznanie šéfa Volva môže prepísať budúcnosť najväčšej investície na východe Slovenska. Prečo je to dobrá vec Stávka proti Stellantisu: hedžové fondy neveria európskemu autopriemyslu Hedžové fondy vytvárajú rekordné stávky proti dlhu aj akciám Stellantisu, Volkswagenu, BMW a Mercedes-Benz. Čínski výrobcovia obsadili 8,5 percenta trhu EÚ Kam smerujú miliardy z Packety a prečo menia pravidlá hry Po najväčšom českom exite posledných rokov nešli peniaze do AI startupov. Bývalá majiteľka Packety Simona Kijonková stavia na úplne iné odvetvia Faktúra za AI rastie. Google prišiel s odpoveďou, ktorú nečakal Firmy premrhajú ročné AI rozpočty ešte pred letom. Kým OpenAI zdvojnásobuje ceny a Anthropic láka výkonnosťou, Google vsádza na niečo, čo rivali nevedia napodobniť Neurovedkyňa radí, ako využiť prokrastináciu a čím nahradiť ciele, ktoré človeka blokujú Toxická kultúra cieľov a výkonnosti naučila človeka vnímať každú aktivitu ako prostriedok k nejakému výsledku, úplne sa pri tom zabudlo na hru
Продовжити читати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/eur%C3%B3pe-hroz%C3%AD-nov%C3%A1-vlna-likvid%C3%A1cie-priemyslu-trend-holding-5ekle?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3Bw71vrw2%2BSEqRCskQqy7H7w%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=2G2c5zeld7nIk1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-newsletter_content_preview_text-0-readmore_button_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow

🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Markets are bleeding into quarter-end: Bitcoin slipped under $60K, ETFs shed $1.79B, and capital is rotating toward AI. Yet regulators stayed busy — Europe sharpened MiCA penalties while Washington locked out a CBDC for four years. 📉 Bitcoin Slides Below $60K Into a Rare Back-to-Back Quarterly Loss Bitcoin dropped under the $60,000 mark heading into quarter-end, down roughly 7% on the week with altcoins falling even harder. Both BTC and ETH are closing the second quarter in the red — a back-to-back losing first half that breaks the usual seasonal pattern. Read full story 🏦 Spot Bitcoin ETFs Bleed $1.79B in Second-Largest Weekly Redemption US spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded $1.79 billion in net outflows last week, the second-largest weekly redemption on record. The sustained exodus points to cooling institutional appetite and piles pressure onto an already-fragile market. More details ⚖️ EU's EBA Unveils Steep MiCA Fines Targeting Token Issuers The European Banking Authority laid out a penalty framework that can strip non-compliant significant token issuers of up to 12.5% of their annual revenue. It's one of the first hard-edged enforcement signals as Europe's landmark MiCA rules move from theory to practice. Read more 🏛️ Congress Bars a US CBDC for Four Years A four-year ban on a Federal Reserve-issued digital dollar was folded into the 21st Century ROAD to Housing Act, which cleared the Senate 85-5 and the House 358-32. Private stablecoin issuers like Circle and Tether stand to benefit most, though the broader fight over digital money is far from settled. See details 🏠 FHFA Tells Fannie and Freddie to Draft Crypto Mortgage Plans The US Federal Housing Finance Agency has directed Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac to prepare proposals for factoring crypto holdings into mortgage lending. If adopted, the move could reshape how digital assets count toward homeownership eligibility. Read full story 💰 Saylor Teases More Bitcoin Buying With Strategy ~$13B Underwater Michael Saylor signaled another Bitcoin purchase even as Strategy's stock keeps sliding and its position sits roughly $13 billion underwater. A Monday filing would mark the firm's fourth straight week of accumulation, despite mounting market skepticism.
